creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Aleksandr Ignatyev from comment #3)
Thanks for the update.
Can you replace PORTVERSION with DISTVERSION?
It doesn't address my concern about prebuilt binaries.
Search for GO_MODULE in the porters handbook, the GO_TARGET to build are ./govc and ./vcsim
You can drop ONLY_FOR_ARCH after addressing the previous point.
